response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and has contributed to developer tooling and CI infrastructure, but the role explicitly requires 2+ years of people management and 3+ years building developer tools (compilers, test automation, build systems) as a primary focus. The resume shows individual contributor roles throughout, with no formal people-management experience, no mobile-platform ecosystem work at scale, and only tangential developer-tooling exposure (GitLab/CI setup, MCP generators). The profile is a strong senior IC, not an engineering manager for a productivity org.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot software engineering across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Hands-on experience with CI/CD, DevOps tooling, test automation, and TDD/craftsmanship practices
Track record of teaching, workshops, and community leadership (Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course, conference talks)
concerns: No demonstrated people-management or formal team-leadership experience (role requires 2+ years)
Developer-tools experience is incidental rather than a 3+ year focused track in build systems/compilers/test automation
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience at the scale implied by the JD (iOS app work is dated and limited)

key_factors.factor: Strong senior IC technical depth and craftsmanship
